UpdatesResearchAnnouncementsTutorialsCustomer Story

</div>

<div id="blog-post-list__list-wrapper">

- <a href="swe-1-5.html" class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">October 29, 2025
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">Jacob Teo, Nikhil Jha,
  Connor Fogarty, Gary Chang, Theodor Marcu, Edison Zhang, Albert Tam,
  Sean Sullivan, Swyx, Silas Alberti</span> </span></span> </span>
  <span class="o-blog-preview__description"> </span>
  ### Introducing SWE-1.5: Our Fast Agent Model

  Today we’re releasing SWE-1.5, the latest in our family of models
  optimized for software engineering. It is a frontier-size model with
  hundreds of billions of parameters that achieves near-SOTA coding
  performance. It also sets a new standard for speed: we partnered with
  Cerebras to serve it at up to 950 tok/s – 6x faster than Haiku 4.5 and
  13x faster than Sonnet 4.5. SWE-1.5 is now available in Windsurf!

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="dotnet-migration-with-devin.html" class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">October 28, 2025
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Automating .NET Framework → .NET Core with Devin

  Engineering teams dread migrating from .NET Framework to .NET Core.
  However, autonomous coding agents are rapidly changing the previously
  known timelines. What once took months, teams are now finishing in as
  little as two weeks — with Devin.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="swe-grep.html" class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">October 16, 2025
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">Ben Pan, Carlo Baronio,
  Albert Tam, Pietro Marsella, Mokshit Jain, Daniel Chiu, Swyx, Silas
  Alberti</span> </span></span> </span>
  <span class="o-blog-preview__description"> </span>
  ### Introducing SWE-grep and SWE-grep-mini: RL for Multi-Turn, Fast Context Retrieval

  We trained SWE-grep and SWE-grep-mini, fast agentic models specialized
  in highly parallel context retrieval. They match the retrieval
  capabilities of frontier coding models, while taking an order of
  magnitude less time. Available now in Windsurf’s new Fast Context
  subagent, and our new SWE-grep demo playground!

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="devin-agent-preview-sonnet-4-5.html"
  class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">September 29, 2025
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">Theodor Marcu</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Announcing Devin Agent Preview with Sonnet 4.5

  Today we're releasing Claude Sonnet 4.5 in Devin, alongside our new
  Devin Agent Preview that's over 2x faster and 12% better on our Jr.
  Developer Evals.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="devin-sonnet-4-5-lessons-and-challenges.html"
  class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">September 29, 2025
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Rebuilding Devin for Claude Sonnet 4.5: Lessons and Challenges

  We rebuilt Devin for Claude Sonnet 4.5. The new version is 2x faster,
  12% better on our Junior Developer Evals, and it's available now in
  Agent Preview. For users who prefer the old Devin, that remains
  available.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="funding-growth-and-the-next-frontier-of-ai-coding-agents.html"
  class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">September 8, 2025
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">Scott Wu</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Funding, growth, and the next frontier of AI coding agents

  Cognition has raised over \$400M at a \$10.2B post-money valuation led
  by Founders Fund. Other existing investors are similarly doubling down
  including Lux Capital and 8VC (who jointly led our previous round),
  Neo, Elad Gil, Definition Capital, and Swish VC. We’re also joined by
  new investors including Bain Capital Ventures, Hanabi Capital, and D1
  Capital.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="how-eight-sleep-uses-devin-as-a-data-analyst.html"
  class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">September 4, 2025
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">Andrew Foong, Technical
  Chief of Staff at Eight Sleep</span> </span></span>
  <span class="o-blog-preview__caption">Community</span> </span>
  <span class="o-blog-preview__description"> </span>
  ### How Eight Sleep Uses Devin as a Data Analyst

  Building the future of sleep requires us to make data-driven product,
  operations, and finance decisions. But as a small team, we faced a
  challenge every scaling company knows well: the flood of random data
  asks. We needed leverage. So we hired an analyst who never sleeps:
  Devin AI.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="ai-data-analyst.html" class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">August 28, 2025
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Build Your Own AI Data Analyst

  Our \#analytics Slack channel looks completely different than it did a
  year ago. Like most companies, we used to struggle with analytics.
  Even seemingly simple questions like "Why is enterprise plan revenue
  spiking for this cohort?" led to ping chains of doom. Getting answers
  often took days or weeks. Now, it takes minutes. What changed? We
  trained our own 24/7 on-demand data scientist.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="from-jenkins-to-github-actions.html"
  class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">August 5, 2025
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Enterprise Guide: Migrating from Jenkins to GitHub Actions at Scale

  How modern DevOps teams are replacing legacy CI/CD pipelines and
  accelerating transformation using AI automation.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="mcp-marketplace.html" class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">July 22, 2025
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Devin's MCP Marketplace

  You can now connect your favorite MCP servers to Devin.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="windsurf.html" class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">July 14, 2025
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">Scott Wu</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Cognition’s acquisition of Windsurf

  Cognition has signed a definitive agreement to acquire Windsurf, the
  agentic IDE.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="coding-agents-101-the-art-of-actually-getting-things-done.html"
  class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">June 27, 2025
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Coding Agents 101: The Art of Actually Getting Things Done

  The year is 2025. Coding agents aren't magic, but they're about the
  closest thing we have. We've noticed some engineers, in particular at
  the senior-to-staff level, finding success faster than others. Here we
  share some top lessons sourced from the experience of our customers
  and ourselves.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="blockdiff.html" class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">June 23, 2025
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">Silas Alberti</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Blockdiff: How we built our own file format for VM disk snapshots

  How we built blockdiff, an open-source tool for rapid block-level
  diffs and snapshots of VM disks.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="dont-build-multi-agents.html" class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">June 12, 2025
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">Walden Yan</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Don’t Build Multi-Agents

  Frameworks for LLM Agents have been surprisingly disappointing. I want
  to offer some principles for building agents based on our own trial &
  error, and explain why some tempting ideas are actually quite bad in
  practice.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="deepwiki-mcp-server.html" class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">May 22, 2025
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### The DeepWiki MCP Server

  The DeepWiki MCP server is here. Get codebase context and answers
  about any public GitHub repository in seconds.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="open-source-initiative-is-back.html"
  class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">May 19, 2025
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### The Devin Open Source Initiative is Back

  Open source code maintainers can now apply for free Devin ACUs.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="devin-2-1.html" class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">May 15, 2025
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Devin 2.1

  We’re announcing some major changes in Devin 2.1. Devin now reports
  its confidence that it can complete tasks using 🟢 🟡 🔴 and is more
  likely to succeed in large codebases with better codebase context 🧠

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="kevin-32b.html" class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">May 6, 2025
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">Carlo Baronio, Pietro
  Marsella, Ben Pan, Silas Alberti</span> </span></span> </span>
  <span class="o-blog-preview__description"> </span>
  ### Kevin-32B: Multi-Turn RL for Writing CUDA Kernels

  We explore reinforcement learning in a multi-turn setting, using
  intermediate feedback from the environment, and masking model thoughts
  to avoid exploding context over multiple turns.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="deepwiki.html" class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">May 5, 2025
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### DeepWiki: AI docs for any repo

  Turn any public GitHub repo into up-to-date documentation you can talk
  to, for free.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="multi-agents-working.html" class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">April 21, 2025
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">Walden Yan</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Multi-Agents: What's Actually Working

  10 months ago I argued against building multi-agent systems. Today, a
  narrower class works, where agents contribute intelligence while
  writes stay single-threaded. I want to share what we've learned
  building them at Cognition.

  </div>

  </div>
- <a href="devin-2.html" class="o-blog-preview"></a>
  <div class="o-blog-preview__inner">

  <div class="o-blog-preview__content">

  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-date">April 3, 2025
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta">
  <span class="o-blog-preview__meta-author">The Cognition Team</span>
  </span></span> </span> <span class="o-blog-preview__description">
  </span>
  ### Devin 2.0

  Introducing an agent-native IDE experience and a new Core plan
  starting at \$20.

  </div>

  </div>

</div>

more</span></a>
